name: All-American Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 pounds small boiling potatoes (white, red, or fingerling)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of water to a boil. Add the potatoes and cook until tender, about 10-12 minutes. Drain and let cool.
2. Peel the cooled potatoes and cut into 1/3-inch-thick slices.
3. In a bowl, mix 3 tablespoons cider vinegar (or to taste) with the potato slices.
4. In another bowl, mash the yolks of 5 hard-boiled eggs. Stir in 2 tablespoons dijon mustard, 1/2 cup chopped sweet onion, and 3 large celery ribs.
5. Gently toss the egg mixture into the potatoes until combined.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Chill or serve at room temperature. Serves 6.
Suggested additions: dill pickle, fresh chives, poppy seeds, crab meat, or corn.
